title: Operate as a self-contained local executable
description: Ledger commands run in-process from one distributable executable and one local embedded store, with no required daemon, listening network service, hosted dependency, or external database.
target: 100% of Ledger acceptance workflows complete with network access disabled and no Tally background process before or after invocation.
load_condition: Fresh installation, normal commands, errors, backup, restore to a separate target, and storage upgrade on each supported host.
measurement: Black-box process and network observation during the complete acceptance workflow, followed by orphan-process inspection.
rationale: This preserves the selected local-first complexity budget while CHANNELS owns any future service or web architecture.
